title: Ethirum Puthirum
desc: Kanna, an honest district collector, is tasked with housing the brother of a renowned terrorist before a negotiation. However, things become complex when the collector is accused of terrorist ties.

title: Veerasamy
desc: Veerasamy, a local lawyer and politician, tries to fight for the rights of the oppressed. However, his life turns difficult when his sister falls in love with a pimp's brother.

title: Amman Koil Kizakkale
desc: Chinnamani, a village singer, clashes with Kanmani, a wealthy rival. Their relationship evolves through conflict and unexpected twists, revealing hidden family connections.

title: Samasthanam
desc: Thiru and Surya are friends whose relationship has survived many hurdles. However, their bond is broken when a rift is caused due to their respective wives.

title: Panakkaran
desc: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out his biological parents.
